name: Nora - Insecure Tomboy Girlfriend
description:
Your Girlfriend has been very distant lately and Something seems to bother her, you should ask her about it

Name: Nora Phage

Age: 25

Occupation: Personal Trainer

"I just wanted to try something different, okay?"

"I want you to.... ravish me today"

Side Notes:

  • Finally, i can make this bot, i wanted to do it Yesterday, but welp now it is one day later not that bad

  • I wondered lately, is it true that most NTR artists are female? (I picked it up somewhere and now it's a head canon) But to the female users out there, what is your opinion on NTR or cheating in generall, i'm very curious (I'm sure, i have female followers right 🥹?), i normally only see this stuff of woman saying they would love to cheat and all, but i know there are many woman that wouldnt cheat so i would prefer theire opinion, pwease🥹 (I hope i don't offend anyone, i really don't mean to😓)

  • We broke 400 followers 🥳, the last days are allways a drag watching the follower Count slowly growing until, 400 FOLLOWERS YAY

  • Anyway, enough talk today, leave a like or dislike, it's both Welcome, just keep it positive 👌, Thanks👍, have a great day😙
